signals.title: Texas HHSC Procurement Opportunities portal
signals.summary: Active solicitations and pre-procurement notices from Texas Health and Human Services Commission. Filter by Medicaid Operations / TMHP / STAR program.

signals.title: HHS OIG Medicaid Portfolio — active oversight docket
signals.summary: Browse current HHS OIG Medicaid audits, evaluations, and advisories. Scraper fell back; visit directly for the latest items.

signals.title: HHS OIG Work Plan — in-progress Medicaid items
signals.summary: The OIG Work Plan lists audits and evaluations underway; filter to Medicaid & CHIP for upcoming report drops.

signals.title: Texas Electronic State Business Daily (ESBD) — search portal
signals.summary: Statewide solicitation search. Filter by HHSC agency code and 'Medical Services' category for current Medicaid awards and renewals.

signals.title: OhioBuys public RFP browser — Ohio Department of Medicaid track
signals.summary: Browse Ohio Department of Medicaid procurement opportunities and active RFPs. Page is JS-rendered; scraper fell back, visit directly for current items.

signals.title: Medicaid Program; 2028 Medicaid Home and Community-Based Services Quality Measure Set
signals.summary: The Home and Community-Based Services (HCBS) Quality Measure Set is a set of nationally standardized quality measures for Medicaid- funded HCBS that is intended to promote more common and consistent use within and across States of nationally standardized quality measures in HCBS …
